name: sonicraft
description: Sonicraft — AI 语音绘图工具：纯语音控制的 Canvas 绘图应用

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend run test --silent && npm --prefix backend test
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
